Site: Guthrie Hausken Portfolio Site V3
Type: Static single-page portfolio
Primary language: English

Purpose:
This file provides a plain-text, machine-readable summary for LLM crawlers and retrieval systems.
It is intentionally not linked in the visible UI.

Core Files:
- /index.html : Main page content and JavaScript interactions
- /styles.css : Visual styles and responsive layout
- /README.md : Project overview and setup notes
- /HTML_DOCUMENTATION.md : HTML structure documentation
- /CSS_DOCUMENTATION.md : CSS architecture documentation
- /JAVASCRIPT_DOCUMENTATION.md : JavaScript behavior documentation

Top-Level Content Areas (from index.html):
- Overview: Bio, mission statement, education, selected strengths
- Portfolio (Writing & documents): Writing samples with preview/open/download actions
- Contact: Contact links and communication information
- CV: Curriculum vitae with profile, education, honors, and experience
- Other works: Additional visual and writing projects

Writing Sample Documents Referenced:
- Board Chair Description
- Cat Manual
- AI Report
- PowerPanel Manual

Additional Works Referenced:
- Rhetoric and Ethics Portfolio
- UO Clothing Exchange Poster
- WNA Party Poster 2
- WNA Party Poster 1
- D&D CV
- Sourdough Guide
- Award-Winning Essay

Interaction Notes:
- Tabs are ARIA-based and keyboard accessible.
- Preview buttons open PDF/image content in a modal viewer.
- Side navigation mirrors the top tab controls on wide screens.

Update Guidance:
- Keep this file concise and factual.
- Update when section names, file names, or document inventory changes.
